note: Legal Freelance pipeline scrape, 7-day window. 6 new leads after dedup against legal-freelance (05-06/07/08/12), daily (05-12/13), and pr-freelance (05-12) reports. All leads grade B (combined 60-79). Dedup excluded recurring matches: Robert Half Investment & Fund Structuring, BlackRock Private Funds Attorney, Latitude #5064/#5077, SEC Reporting Counsel (Atlanta), Lyfecoin, Ropes & Gray AM Funds Program, Allocate Fund Formation, Axiom, Paragon Legal. Three distinct Latitude Legal postings (#5073/#5075/#5076) are included separately — they are different live roles, but a single Latitude AM relationship unlocks all of them plus the Nashville part-time M&A role. Autonomous run: no clarifying questions asked. Decision noted — enhanced CRM fields written to dedicated Prisma columns (schema now has vertical/subvertical/engagementModel/buyerType/compensationText/remoteFlag/employmentTypeRaw/urgencyScore as real columns) rather than packed into techStack JSON as the 05-12 script did.

leads.name: Latitude Legal — Commercial Contracts Attorney (Remote Contract Engagement #5073)
leads.compensationText: $160,000-$200,000+ annualized when calculated on a full-time basis; full benefits (medical/dental/vision, life, LTD, AD&D) at 20+ hr/wk; complimentary professional liability insurance
leads.employmentTypeRaw: Contract engagement — full or part-time (W2 at Latitude)
leads.notes: Combined 70 / Grade B. Core commercial-contracts contract engagement: structuring, drafting, negotiating, reviewing sales, vendor/procurement, IT, marketing, supply, logistics and consulting-services agreements. W2 + full benefits at 20+ hr/wk is unusual for fractional work (most shops are 1099 only). Distinct from the #5064/#5077 roles already in the DB — applying to a named role routes to the hiring manager, not generic intake, so worth a direct application. Pitch angle: position Katie's in-house commercial-paper depth (vendor/customer paper, playbook build) plus fund-side vendor work. Pair this application with #5075 and #5076 — one Latitude AM relationship unlocks all three.

leads.name: Latitude Legal — Technology and Commercial Contracts Attorney (Remote #5076)
leads.compensationText: $160,000-$200,000+ annualized (Latitude published band); full benefits at 20+ hr/wk; complimentary professional liability insurance
leads.employmentTypeRaw: Contract engagement — full or part-time (W2 at Latitude)

contacts.name: Latitude Legal Recruiting
contacts.title: Attorney Talent Team (Technology & Commercial Contracts role #5076)

leads.notes: Combined 70 / Grade B. Companion to #5073, with a technology-contracting tilt (SaaS, data, licensing, IT agreements alongside general commercial paper). Slightly narrower than #5073 — only apply if Katie has meaningful tech/SaaS contracting reps; otherwise lead with #5073. Same Latitude W2 + benefits structure. Pitch angle: SaaS/vendor agreement playbooks and tech-transaction support for portfolio companies. Note: Latitude also has a near-identical posting #7032 ('Remote Contract Engagement' variant) — treat as the same role family, apply once.

leads.name: Latitude Legal — Corporate M&A Attorney (Remote #5075)
leads.compensationText: Comp not quoted on this specific posting; Latitude's published contract-attorney band is $160,000-$200,000+ annualized with benefits at 20+ hr/wk
leads.employmentTypeRaw: Contract engagement — full or part-time (W2 at Latitude)
leads.notes: Combined 70 / Grade B. Latitude seeks corporate transactional attorneys with extensive M&A and private-equity experience to work on client assignments. Strongest of the three Latitude postings on substance for Katie — M&A + PE experience is squarely in-ICP and adjacent to fund work. comp_credible scored +10 on the basis of Latitude's consistently published $160-200k band across postings (not quoted on this specific page — confirm with recruiter). Pitch angle: deal execution and diligence management for PE buyers and portfolio-company add-ons; this is the lead-in conversation with the Latitude AM, then layer #5073/#5076.

leads.name: Viskase Companies, LLC — Contracts Corporate Counsel (Part-Time, Remote)
leads.industry: Manufacturing (publicly traded global food-packaging / casings manufacturer)
leads.notes: Combined 60 / Grade B. Part-time + remote + direct in-house buyer is exactly the engagement shape Katie is optimizing for — no staffing-firm intermediary, posted straight to ACC Jobline. Scope: draft/review/negotiate customer, supplier and vendor contracts for a publicly traded global manufacturer. Off-ICP on industry (manufacturing, not funds) and comp not stated, which caps the fit score, but the engagement model and direct-buyer access make it a real opportunity. Pitch angle: lead with in-house commercial-contracting throughput and playbook discipline; frame as steady part-time retainer coverage. Confirm hours/week and whether they want W2 vs. 1099 with the GC.

leads.name: Latitude Legal — M&A Attorney (Part-Time, Fully Remote; energy & advanced-technology company)
leads.industry: Legal Staffing / ALSP placing into high-growth energy & advanced-technology company
leads.fundingStage: n/a (ALSP placement; client is a high-growth operating company)
leads.compensationText: $225,000-$278,000+ annualized when calculated on a full-time basis
leads.employmentTypeRaw: Part-Time; scalable to Full-Time; Fully Remote
leads.notes: Combined 70 / Grade B. Part-time, scalable-to-FT, fully remote M&A role placing into a high-growth energy/advanced-tech company; works alongside the company's VP of Legal and outside counsel from structuring through post-closing integration, including financing-arrangement support. Comp band published and well above market ($225-278k+ annualized). CAVEAT: posting first appeared 2026-02-13 — outside the 7-day window and likely stale; recency scored 0 and urgencyScore held to 45. Included because it is still an active listing and a strong substantive fit. Verify it's still open with the Latitude recruiter before investing in a tailored application. Pitch angle: transaction execution + financing support as fractional deal counsel.

leads.name: Radian Capital — General Counsel (Remote)
leads.location: Remote (firm based in New York, NY)
leads.fundingStage: Established growth-equity firm (founded 2016; 58 investments; $5M-$30M per deal)
leads.notes: Combined 65 / Grade B. Permanent FT GC search — not freelance — but ICP-perfect on substance: fund structuring, fund distributions, capital raising/transactions, managing outside firms, and legal/regulatory diligence across Fund, Firm and Portfolio at a NYC growth-equity firm. Highest fund_focus score in this scrape (+20). Same play as the BlackRock lead already in the DB: (a) apply directly if open to a perm seat; (b) higher-yield — LinkedIn outreach to a Co-Founder offering interim GC coverage to bridge the search, which often converts to a fractional retainer. engagementModel set to 'interim' to reflect the recommended pitch, not the posting's stated type. Long-game relationship lead.
